summary: Classified the ten job-listed PRs from the hydrated preflight artifact. This is an inventory shard with no shared canonical, so open non-security PRs are kept independently, already-closed PRs are skipped as closed, and security-sensitive PRs are routed to central security handling.

actions.reason: Standalone open PR with supplied proof and no duplicate/superseding canonical in this shard; keep for normal maintainer review.
Security-boundary hardening/config mutation work must be handled by central OpenClaw security review, not ProjectClownfish cleanup.
Standalone open PR with clear scope and proof; not a duplicate or low-signal close candidate.
Already closed and superseded by merged #91281; no mutation should be planned.
Already closed historical PR; no further inventory action is available in plan mode.
Open standalone PR with unresolved review findings and dirty merge state; keep open independently rather than close or merge.
Even though closed, the security-sensitive candidate should be quarantined as out of scope for ProjectClownfish mutation.
Already closed because current main already covered the work; keep closed with no planned mutation.
Open standalone automation/test PR with failing proof/checks and no duplicate canonical; keep open independently for author or maintainer follow-up.
Already closed historical PR; no further inventory action is available in plan mode.
